name: Champagne Jelly
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Champagne or dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pectin and water in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat, then boil for one minute while stirring constantly.
3. Reduce the heat to medium and add the champagne and sugar.
4. Keep the mixture just below boiling point and stir until the sugar is completely dissolved (approximately 5 minutes).
5. Remove from heat and skim off any foam using a metal spoon if needed.
6. Quickly pour into hot sterilized half-pint jars, sealing with 1/8-inch hot paraffin or canning lids immediately.
7. Serve with poultry or meat. Makes about 6 half-pints.
